mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_dp_infect WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY CASE WHEN impl_date IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, impl_date DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_dp_infect WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_dp_infect WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_dp_infect WHERE deleted = 0 AND program_type = #{programType}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_dp_infect WHERE deleted = 0 AND next_due_date IS NOT NULL AND next_due_date >= CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AND next_due_date <= DATEADD(day, #{days}, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_dp_infect (worker_name, department, program_type, disease_type, impl_date, result, status, next_due_date, notes, deleted, created_by, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ( #{workerName}, #{department,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{programType}, #{diseaseType,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{implDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{result,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{nextDueDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{notes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, 0, #{createdBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_dp_infect SET worker_name = #{workerName}, department = #{department,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, program_type = #{programType}, disease_type = #{diseaseType,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, impl_date = #{implDate,jdbcType=DATE}, result = #{result,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, next_due_date = #{nextDueDate,jdbcType=DATE}, notes = #{notes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_dp_infect SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
